FREELANCE AGREEMENT

1. SCOPE
Freelancer agrees to deliver design services as outlined in Exhibit A.

2. PAYMENT
Fixed fee of $2,000, payable 50% upfront and 50% upon completion.

3. IP
Upon full payment, Client owns final deliverables. Freelancer retains portfolio rights.

4. REVISIONS
Includes up to 3 revisions.

5. TERMINATION
Either party may terminate with 14 days notice.
